handles.title: Handles to track
handles.description: X handles to monitor for account_tracking mode (without @).

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Keywords or phrases for keyword_search prospecting mode.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: account_tracking scrapes listed handles. keyword_search prospects via keywords.

maxPostsPerHandle.title: Max posts per handle
maxPostsPerHandle.description: Maximum number of recent posts to fetch per handle.

maxSearchResults.title: Max keyword search results
maxSearchResults.description: Maximum posts to collect per keyword search.

followerBaselinePath.title: Follower baseline (KV key)
followerBaselinePath.description: Key-value store key holding previous follower counts for delta calculation. Leave blank to skip delta.
